title: Wall of Remembrance
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Wall of Remembrance''' was a landmark located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Almas]].

It was essentially a massive wall, similar to the [[Memory wall]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], that held the names of all the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in battle. As part of a ceremony, after the name was engraved on the wall, any surviving students or friends of the slain Jedi were allowed to make a speech on the life of their comrade.

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the number of names on the wall grew rapidly, which was a fact that alarmed the Jedi that studied at [[Almas Academy]].

A similar wall was located on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]].
